subcodes.first_line: O Divine Breezes, waft ye forth! O Gentle Winds of God, breathe ye and journey unto the lands of the southern horizon, where that realm doth lie [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایا نفحات الله تنسمی ایا نسمات الله تنفسی و اقصدی دیار الطرف القبلی ارضا فیها
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @eulogies; reminiscences, @visitation Tablets, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @pain of love; love as veil
